positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial mountain range at dusk. The mountains are sharp, clean silhouettes of jagged peaks, nestled beneath a crescent moon and two small, stylized constellations of stars. The sky gradient transitions from deep indigo at the top to warm lavender near the horizon line. Scattered across the sky are subtle, hand-drawn cosmic dust trails and three small, glowing geometric planets. The foreground features a stylized, silhouetted river running through the valleys. The overall style should be modern retro-pop art meets graphic Scandinavian folk design, using high-contrast flat colors and crisp vector lines. Central composition, perfect for a T-shirt print.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, grunge, grainy, out of frame, multiple subjects, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, low contrast, realistic photo, photo-realistic, messy, cluttered
